title: Network handoff contract v1
description: The one fixed shape every hop uses. A work_item flows orchestrator -> role; a result flows back. Vague handoffs fail at every seam — everything a role needs is IN the item, everything the orchestrator routes on is IN the result.

id.description: stable work-item id; survives rework loops

task_spec.description: bounded, self-contained instruction; open-ended specs are a builder reject

cairn_line.description: the line this work happens on / is read from

artifacts.description: prior hops' outputs this role needs

base_knowledge.description: commonplace topic slugs to load at spawn

personality.description: thin label stamped at spawn; zero capability

prior_results.description: full results of earlier hops on this item

origin.description: trigger source; rework carries the rejecting result in prior_results

agent.description: pool identity (agent-01..N) — accountability, not the personality

verdict.description: done = producing roles; pass/reject = gates; blocked = needs orchestrator/operator input

reasons.description: REQUIRED when verdict != pass/done; most-severe first; machine-routable

evidence.description: self-verify proof: test output, curl result, render path. Producing roles MUST include it
